    ⇪

    Drop a CSV here, or click to browse

    Your file is parsed locally. No upload to any server.

    Expected columns (case-sensitive): id, address_state, application_type, emp_length, emp_title, grade, home_ownership, issue_date (DD-MM-YYYY), loan_status, purpose, sub_grade, term, verification_status, annual_income, dti, installment, int_rate, loan_amount, total_acc, total_payment.
